tskSummary.text:
📝 AI SUMMARY
────────────────────────────────────────
This transcript captures a sales call between Daniel from True North Brand Life, a moving company, and Hafiz, a prospective client, discussing a long-distance move.

Main Topic: Quoting for a comprehensive moving service, including packing, transportation, and storage, for a move from Saskatchewan to Ontario.

Key Details and Services:

  • Client & Move Type: Hafiz is moving from a two-bedroom townhouse in Saskatchewan to Ontario (specifically Mississauga). He is a family of five (two adults, three kids).

  • Move Date: Last week of April.

  • Desired Services (Full Package): Hafiz requires a full-service move, including:
  • Packing (wrapping, bubble wraps for delicate items)

  • Assembling and disassembling furniture

  • Loading and unloading

  • Transportation (door-to-door, room-to-room service)

  • Setup at the new location

  • Inventory (Tentative List):
  • Living Room: Two sofas (one 3-seater), one 55-inch TV (requires a box provided by the company).

  • Bedroom: One king-size bed with mattress.

  • Other: One office chair, kids' bicycle, 20 boxes (including 8 travel suitcases; boxes can be provided by the company for an extra charge or client can arrange).

  • Note: Hafiz mentioned other items (dressers, study desk, chairs, mirrors, night tables, dining table, appliances, kids' car) that he might sell before the move; this list is subject to confirmation with his wife.

  • Logistics & Additional Needs:
  • Staircases: The pickup location has staircases (10-12 steps for sofa, 24-25 steps for the bed on the second floor), which may incur a one-time staircase fee if over 10 steps.

  • Parking: Adequate parking space is available at the pickup location.

  • Destination (Ontario): Hafiz is still looking for a permanent residence in Mississauga and anticipates needing storage for 1-2 months for all items. The company confirmed they can provide storage.

  • Delivery Timeline: Once items are picked up, delivery is estimated to take a minimum of 8 days and a maximum of 10 days.

Pricing Structure (Approximate Quote):

  • Truck & Crew: A 22-foot truck and two professional movers will be assigned.

  • Weight-Based Cost: The final price is based on the actual weight of items, determined at a certified government scaling station after pickup (receipt provided to client).
  • First 1000 lbs: $1200. This fee is comprehensive and includes the truck, fuel, transportation, and scaling fee.

  • Additional Weight: For every pound exceeding 1000 lbs, an additional charge of $1.20 per pound.

  • Labor Charges: For loading and unloading only (driving hours are not charged separately).
  • Rate: $130 per hour for two men.

  • Estimated Time: Typically 2-3 hours for loading and unloading.

  • Storage Charges:
  • Rate: $170 per month (defined as 28 days).

  • Box Charges: If the company provides boxes, a medium-sized box costs approximately $6-7.

Next Steps:

  • Daniel will immediately send an email estimate to Hafiz.

  • Hafiz will review the estimate and inventory list with his wife and provide a finalized list and confirmation within one to two days.

  • Daniel plans to call Hafiz back in the evening to discuss the estimate further and finalize the price.
